_provenance.note: Public links abstracted from the source's resource catalog. Named mentors + personal tracking deliberately excluded. Refresh: append cards here when the source grows new public links; then re-stamp source_commit.

books.title: The Best Textbooks on Every Subject
books.description: A crowdsourced LessWrong thread of the single best textbook per subject.

books.title: Leanpub
books.description: In-progress and indie technical books, often sold pay-what-you-want.

courses.description: A structured professional data-science program from MIT xPRO.

courses.description: Free MIT course materials, organized by a guided curriculum.

courses.title: MasterClass: Bob Iger on Business Strategy
courses.description: Disney's former CEO on leadership and business strategy.

courses.title: spaCy Course
courses.description: A free, interactive course on industrial-strength NLP with spaCy.

courses.title: Art of Islamic Pattern: Online Classes
courses.description: Online classes on the geometry and craft of Islamic pattern.

videos.title: Khan Academy: Information Theory
videos.description: A clear video walkthrough of the fundamentals of information theory.

videos.title: Transforming Code into Beautiful, Idiomatic Python
videos.description: Raymond Hettinger's classic talk on writing Pythonic code.

blogs.title: Out of My Gord
blogs.description: Personal thoughts in no particular order; a thinking-out-loud blog.

blogs.title: Hacking, Distributed
blogs.description: Deep posts on distributed systems and their failure modes.

blogs.title: Kimball Techniques
blogs.description: The Kimball Group's canonical data-warehouse and BI techniques.

blogs.title: mattorb.com
blogs.description: An engineering and product blog worth following.

blogs.title: Spurious Correlations
blogs.description: Tyler Vigen's reminder that correlation is not causation.

experts.title: Raymond Hettinger
experts.description: Python core developer; his talks on idiomatic Python are essential.

experts.title: Stewart Smith
experts.description: Systems engineer; author of libeatmydata and other low-level tools.

mentors.description: Cloud Native Computing Foundation's open mentoring programs.
